items.title: Currenc Group Announces Extension of Exclusivity Period for Proposed Reverse Merger with Animoca Brands Corporation Limited
items.summary: Currenc Group Inc. (NASDAQ: CURR) has extended the exclusivity period for its proposed reverse merger with Animoca Brands Corporation Limited to June 30, 2026. Under the deal, Animoca Brands shareholders would own approximately 95% of the merged entity, with the resulting company operating under the Animoca Brands name on Nasdaq. The extension reflects progress in due diligence and preparatory work, with closing targeted for Q3 2026.

items.title: GraniteShares Announces Reverse Split of MRAL, MSTP, and SMCL
items.summary: GraniteShares announced reverse share splits for three 2x leveraged daily ETFs effective April 30, 2026. MRAL will execute a 1-for-10 reverse split, while MSTP and SMCL will execute 1-for-20 reverse splits. The splits will increase per-share NAV and price while maintaining total shareholder investment value. Fractional shares will be redeemed at split-adjusted NAV with no transaction fees.
